description: Application of sociological theory and analysis to environmental issues. Examines the ways in which environmental stewardship and conflict are embedded within broader cultural, social, and political contexts.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: SOC 181,SOC/​C&E SOC  140,210,211,F&W ECOL/​C&E SOC/​SOC  248,ENVIR ST 112,113,GEOG/​ENVIR ST  139,337,339,GEOG 101, or graduate/professional standing
